title: lysiloma tergeminum
intro: Lysiloma tergeminum, also known as the Guanacaste or Texas ebony, is a tree native to the Americas, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lysiloma tergeminum include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and skin infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and also used as a topical ointment, to harness its medicinal properties.
